name: Macadamia Nut Cookies- Mom Salinger
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 325°F. Blend flour, butter, sugar and orange peel until mixture holds together in a smooth ball. Stir in macadamia nuts. Chill for 30 minutes. Place dough between wax paper and roll out to 1/4 inch thickness. Cut diagonally into 2-inch diamonds. Bake on ungreased cookie sheet for 15-18 minutes.
